title: GUI Smoke Test Shell Matrix Execution
description: Run tests/Invoke-GUISmokeTest.ps1 -RunShellMatrix to validate GUI launch, form display, menu presence, and tray icon on both PS 5.1 and PS 7. Launch-GUI-SmokeTest.bat calls this mode. Baseline: 33 PASS, 0 FAIL, 1 WARN.
notes: Routine: Run after feature additions. Check pass count >= 33. Any new FAIL items added to regression backlog.
